parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001', max_tokens: 400, system: 'You are a job list formatter. Every job you receive has already been filtered and confirmed as a remote QA role. Your job is NOT to filter further. Score and display ALL jobs you receive. Never drop a job. Output only the formatted list, no explanations, no preamble, no questions.', messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.prompt }] }) }}
